name: Crisp Pizza Dough (Tdn)
recipeInstructions:
1. Dissolve the yeast and sugar in lukewarm water; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, combine 2-3/4 cups flour and the salt. Stir in the yeast mixture and olive oil until a dough forms.
3. On a lightly floured work surface, knead the dough for about 10 minutes, working in additional flour as needed until the dough is sticky.
4. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let rise until doubled in size, approximately 40 minutes.
5. Makes one 16-inch crust.
Assorted recipes from the Detroit News, entered by Diane Pahl
